proof_boundary: This kit defines owner-approved resolved-forecast and baseline inputs. It is not prediction-accuracy proof, benchmark proof, or world-class forecasting evidence until real resolved data is supplied and scored.

required_owner_inputs.purpose: Owner-approved resolved forecast export for audit:calibration:ledger.
notes: Use only binary resolved forecasts with yes/no, true/false, 1/0, occurred/not_occurred, or equivalent outcomes.
Attach prediction_timestamp before resolved_at for every row; current_probability without a pre-resolution timestamp is not sufficient for an accuracy claim.
Attach resolution_criteria and exclusion_review so leakage, ambiguity, and post-hoc selection can be audited.
Exclude unresolved, ambiguous, canceled, non-binary, or probability-missing questions.
Provide resolution source URL or notes for each included row.
Do not include confidential buyer, user, or credential data.

required_owner_inputs.artifact: forecast_predictions sidecar or embedded forecast_predictions array
required_owner_inputs.purpose: Optional community/user prediction rows for community_prediction_mean scoring.
notes: Use only probabilities made before resolution.
Keep forecaster identity redacted unless explicit permission exists.
Aggregate baselines must be comparable to the evaluated question set.
Per-forecast baselines can be supplied separately with forecast_id, probability, and optional outcome.
Source URLs, sample sizes, question-set scope, timestamp policy, and comparability notes must be attached to every baseline claim.

acceptance_gates.pass_condition: audit:accuracy:validate-inputs passes against the owner-approved forecast export and real comparable baseline before scoring commands run.
audit:calibration:ledger is run with --source-mode approved_export against owner-approved resolved forecasts.
At least one scored source has sample_size >= 25.
Reliability bins are generated with --bins 5 and non-empty bins are reported with observed_frequency and calibration_error.
audit:forecast:benchmark compares the approved ledger against a real human/community/pro/external baseline on same or explicitly comparable questions.
Market copy remains calibration-aware decision support unless approved export, sample size, reliability, and comparable baseline gates all pass.

commands_after_owner_export: Re-run audit:commercial:confidence only after the approved ledger and real baseline artifacts are attached.
current_blockers: Current calibration ledger status is not_launch_proof with mode sample_fixture.
Current benchmark status is sample_only_not_launch_proof with ledger mode sample_fixture.
No owner-approved resolved export or real comparable baseline is attached in this evidence set.

external_methodology_alignment.requirement: Evaluate AI forecasting on unresolved-when-forecast questions and compare against human/community baselines on shared resolved questions.
Use a dynamic contamination-resistant forecasting benchmark with human comparison groups where possible.
Measure and monitor performance in deployment-relevant conditions before relying on system claims.
